steps.title: Use a restrictive clause
steps.content: The phrase one European city needs a clause that identifies which city is being described: the city many travelers recommend. Because the clause is essential to identifying the city, it should not be set off with a comma.

steps.title: Avoid comma and preposition errors
steps.content: A wrongly puts a comma before that. B uses comma plus which, making the identifying clause sound nonessential. C creates an ungrammatical recommend in which structure. The sentence needs a restrictive clause with no comma. The answer is D.
